# Locations

Every place in the world, at any scale. Continents, cities, buildings, rooms.

Hierarchy is expressed through the `parent` field, not folder nesting. A room's parent is a building, a building's parent is a district, and so on. Adjacency is expressed through `connections`.

## Schema
- type: location
- name, parent: wiki-link to containing location
- connections: list of wiki-links to adjacent/reachable locations
- ruler: wiki-link to character
- factions: list of wiki-links
- tags: freeform list

## Contents
(empty — world not yet created)
